items.title: Ranking retrieved results
items.description: Order retrieved chunks or candidates by score with sorted(results, key=lambda r: r.score, reverse=True) before building the context window.

items.title: Lightweight transforms
items.description: Apply quick per-item transformations (lowercasing, extracting a field) with map or a comprehension driven by a small function.

items.title: Configurable callbacks
items.description: Pass a function — often a functools.partial with API config pre-filled — as a callback to streaming clients or event handlers.

items.title: Custom sort/selection logic
items.description: Use key functions to sort by multiple criteria (e.g. score then recency) or to pick the best item with max(items, key=...).

items.title: Composable pipeline steps
items.description: Represent pipeline stages as functions and pass them around (higher-order style) so steps can be reordered, swapped or tested in isolation.
